idea-plugin.name: AI Commit Message Generator
idea-plugin.description:
English

Generate polished Git commit messages from the files already selected in the JetBrains Commit tool window.

  • Configuration path: Settings / Preferences | Other Settings | AI Commit Message.
  • Writes the result directly into the Commit Message field.
  • Supports Claude and Codex/OpenAI-compatible relays with provider model presets and an on-demand custom model field.
  • Reflects local ~/.claude and ~/.codex config for model, Base URL, API key, and Wire API, while preserving user-saved plugin settings after save.
  • Includes a restore-defaults action that re-reads local provider config without modifying local tool files.
  • Includes a built-in commitlint-style git-commit Skill plus compact provider-specific local Skill selection.
  • Offers localized status, validation, failure notifications, streaming updates, and sensitive-path filtering.

中文

根据 JetBrains Commit 工具窗口中已选择的文件，生成更完整、更规范的 Git commit message。

  • 将结果直接写入 Commit Message 输入框。
  • 支持 Claude 和 Codex/OpenAI 兼容中转站，提供按平台整理的模型预设，并仅在选择自定义模型时展示自定义输入框。
  • 可从本地 ~/.claude 和 ~/.codex 配置回显模型、Base URL、API Key 和 Wire API，保存后优先使用插件自己的配置。
  • 提供恢复默认能力，可重新读取本地提供方配置，且不会修改本地工具配置文件。
  • 内置 commitlint 风格的 git-commit Skill，同时支持更紧凑的按提供方本地 Skill 选择。
  • 提供本地化生成状态、校验提示、失败通知、流式输出和敏感路径过滤。
  • 配置入口：Settings / Preferences | Other Settings | AI Commit Message。
idea-plugin.change-notes:
English

  • Refreshed Claude and Codex model presets, including GPT-5.5 and Claude Opus 4.7 defaults, with custom model input shown only after selecting the custom model option.
  • Added automatic reflection from local ~/.claude and ~/.codex configs, including Codex auth.json, plus a restore-defaults action that re-reads local config without modifying it.
  • Made saved plugin provider settings take priority after the first save, so reopening settings keeps the user-saved values instead of overwriting them from local config.
  • Localized commit-language labels, generation status, validation messages, and failure notifications; generation failures now clear the Commit Message field and only show errors as notifications.
  • Improved prompt scaling for complex single-file diffs so generated messages stay concrete instead of collapsing into generic one-bullet summaries.
  • Kept modified large-file diffs visible by extracting truncated line-level changes instead of sending an omitted-content placeholder to the model.
  • Improved settings layout with a cleaner Codex Base URL row and compact local Skill labels, changed the default timeout to 75 seconds, and removed bundled unused dependencies to shrink the plugin package.

中文

  • 更新 Claude 和 Codex 模型预设，默认使用 GPT-5.5 和 Claude Opus 4.7，并且只有选择自定义模型选项后才显示自定义模型输入框。
  • 新增自动回显本地 ~/.claude 和 ~/.codex 配置，包括 Codex auth.json，并提供“恢复默认”按钮用于重新读取本地配置且不修改本地文件。
  • 首次保存后优先使用插件保存的提供方配置，重新进入设置页时不会再被本地配置覆盖。
  • 提交语言名称、生成状态、校验提示和失败通知均按目标提交语言展示；生成失败时清空 Commit Message 输入框，错误只通过通知弹窗展示。
  • 优化复杂单文件 diff 的 prompt 缩放策略，避免生成结果被压缩成泛泛的一条正文。
  • 修改型大文件会提取截断后的行级变更，不再把内容省略占位符直接发送给模型。
  • 优化设置页布局，清理 Codex Base URL 行并压缩本地 Skill 显示宽度；默认超时调整为 75 秒，同时移除未使用依赖以显著缩小插件包体积。
